description_long: This bungalow features a steeply pitched gable roof with dark green shingles and large triangular windows on the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the main living area. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, complemented by a stone accent wall beneath the front windows. A spacious wooden deck wraps around the front and side, with steps leading up to a covered porch area furnished with outdoor seating. The rear of the bungalow is simpler, with a single door and fewer windows, while the side elevation reveals a row of skylights integrated into the roof. The structure sits on a rectangular plot of grass, bordered by a gravel or stone pathway. The overall design is modern yet cozy, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A modern bungalow with a steep gable roof, large front windows, and a wraparound wooden deck with a covered porch. The exterior combines light gray walls, stone accents, and green roof shingles.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the large triangular windows, stone accent wall, and spacious wooden deck with outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Side and partial rear view highlighting the skylights on the roof, the side entrance door, and the continuation of the deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the simple back wall with minimal windows and the full length of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the main entrance, steps leading to the deck, and the covered porch area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing triangular windows and grouped skylights on the side
